items.title: Trump leaves Republicans guessing on midterms plans as outlook darkens
items.description: The president is said to be eager to increase his involvement but has yet to approve a spending plan for his $300 million-plus war chest.

items.title: A Republican lawmaker embarks on his biggest showdown yet with Trump
items.description: Thomas Massie has challenged Trump on issues including the Epstein files and is trying to survive reelection in deep-red Kentucky.
